overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a beige jacket exploring a rainy urban environment at night. The character approaches a wooden bar building, peers through a window, enters to explore the dimly lit interior with pool tables and a stage, then exits and runs across a wet street.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked parking lot behind a commercial building

events.description: character slows from running to walking while approaching the building side window

agents.ego_description: running through the rainy parking lot toward the building, navigating between parked vehicles

entered.detail: vintage yellow and white van parked in the lot
blue sedan parked near the building
single-story wooden structure with horizontal siding and illuminated windows
illuminated pink neon sign mounted on a tall pole
wooden power pole with yellow bands and electrical transformers

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a rain-soaked asphalt parking lot at night, approaching a wooden commercial building. Parked vehicles including a yellow van and blue car flank the path as the character moves toward the side of the building to peer through a window.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway along the side of the bar

events.description: yellow van passes out of view behind the character as they move along the building wall
moving from the side of the building to the front entrance area
entering the building, transitioning from dark rainy exterior to warm interior lighting

agents.ego_description: peering through a window into the bar interior, then moving along the wall to the front entrance and stepping inside

entered.detail: large window with dark curtains revealing warm amber interior light
black wall-mounted payphone enclosure with glass front
wooden armchair with cardboard box sitting beside the building
doorway with glass panels leading into the bar

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a window to peer inside the dimly lit bar, then continues along the wooden wall past a payphone and outdoor chair. Moving to the front entrance, the character steps inside, transitioning from the rainy exterior to the warm interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: vintage bar interior with stage and pool tables

events.description: character pauses briefly near the stage before continuing toward the pool table area
moving from the stage area toward the pool table and bar counter area

agents.ego_description: walking through the bar, observing the stage with musical instruments, then moving past pool tables toward the exit

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the bar counter

entered.detail: raised wooden platform with purple and pink stage lighting
red acoustic guitar on a stand positioned on the stage
drum kit with white bass drum set up on the stage
green felt pool table with overhead rectangular light fixture
wooden bar with bottles and glasses visible behind it
red upholstered booth seating along the walls

segments.scene_description: Inside the warmly lit bar, the character walks past a stage featuring a red guitar and drum set under purple lights. The character continues through the space, passing green pool tables and red booths, with a bartender visible behind the counter in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban street with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: exiting the building back to the rainy exterior environment
character begins crossing the wet street at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: exiting the bar and running through the parking lot, then crossing the wet street in the rain

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt walking in the opposite direction near the crosswalk

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing on the wet asphalt
large leafy trees lining the opposite side of the street
vehicle with headlights on approaching in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character exits the bar back into the rainy night, running through the parking lot toward the street. Crossing the wet crosswalk, the character passes other pedestrians and approaches the opposite side of the road as a car approaches in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked exterior into the warm glow of a nightlife venue before returning to the wet city streets. It begins with the character running through a dark asphalt parking lot past parked vehicles, moving toward the side of a wooden building to peer through a window. As the character continues past an outdoor payphone and chair, the scene shifts from the rainy night into the warm, dimly lit interior of a bar. The camera then glides through the venue, passing a purple-lit stage with a red guitar and drum set, green pool tables, and red booths with a bartender in the background. Finally, the character exits the building and runs back into the rain, crossing a wet street past other pedestrians as a car approaches in the distance.
